policies.title: Password Reset
policies.content: Password reset via Settings > Security > Reset Password or 'Forgot Password' on login page. Reset link valid for 1 hour. After 5 failed login attempts, account locked for 30 minutes. Admin can unlock team member accounts from Admin Console.

policies.title: Two-Factor Authentication
policies.content: 2FA supported via authenticator apps (TOTP) and SMS. Backup codes provided at setup (10 single-use codes). Lost 2FA device: verify identity via registered email + last 4 digits of payment method. Enterprise supports SSO/SAML.

policies.title: Account Management
policies.content: Account owners can transfer ownership to another admin. Deletion requires confirmation and 7-day grace period. Team members removed retain access until end of billing cycle. Profile updates sync across all connected services within 5 minutes.
